Part.Source:
Event Start
Do "InitAuthenticationSaml" &FunctionId = GAMAuthenticationFunctions.OnlyAuthentication &FunctionId.Enabled = False If &Mode = TrnMode.Display or &Mode = TrnMode.Delete If &Mode = TrnMode.Display BtnEnter.Visible = False Endif BtnAdd.Visible = False &FunctionId.Enabled = False &IsEnable.Enabled = False &Dsc.Enabled = False &SmallImageName.Enabled = False &BigImageName.Enabled = False &Impersonate.Enabled = False BtnEnter.Caption = "WWP_GAM_Delete" &ServiceProviderEntityID.Enabled = False &IdentityProviderEntityID.Enabled = False &SamlEndpointLocation.Enabled = False &SingleLogoutendpoint.Enabled = False &DisableSingleLogout.Enabled = False &LocalSiteURL.Enabled = False &KeyStPathCredential.Enabled = False &KeyStPwdCredential.Enabled = False &KeyAliasCredential.Enabled = False &KeyStoreCredential.Enabled = False &KeyStoreFilePathTrustCred.Enabled = False &KeyStorePwdTrustCred.Enabled = False &keyAliasTrustCred.Enabled = False &KeyStoreTrustCred.Enabled = False &isRedirectBinding.Enabled = False &ForceAuthn.Enabled = False &AuthnContext.Enabled = False &NameIDPolicyFormat.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserBirthdayTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserEmailTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserExternalIdTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserFirstNameTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserGenderTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserGenderValues.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserLanguageTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameGenAuto.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserNameTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserTimeZoneTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserURLImageTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserURLProfileTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseErrorDescriptionTag.Enabled = False Else If &Mode = TrnMode.Insert &Name.Enabled = True Else &Name.Enabled = False EndIf Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' Grid.Rows = Page.Rows
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Grid.Load
For &GAMPropertySimple in &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserProperties
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &DeleteProperty.FromImage(ActionDelete) &DeleteProperty.TooltipText = ""
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
&DynamicPropName = &GAMPropertySimple.Id &DynamicPropTag = &GAMPropertySimple.Value If &Mode = TrnMode.Display or &Mode = TrnMode.Delete &DeleteProperty.Visible = false &DynamicPropName.Enabled = false &DynamicPropTag.Enabled = false EndIf load EndFor
EndEvent
Event 'DoAdd'
&DeleteProperty.FromImage(ActionDelete) &DeleteProperty.Visible = true &DynamicPropName.Enabled = true &DynamicPropName.Visible = true &DynamicPropTag.Enabled = true &DynamicPropTag.Visible = true load
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'CheckRequiredFields'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True If &Name.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','WWP_GAM_Name'), DVMessageType.error, &Name.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &LocalSiteURL.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','WWP_GAM_LocalSiteURL'), DVMessageType.error, &LocalSiteURL.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &ServiceProviderEntityId.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','WWP_GAM_ServiceProviderEntityID'), DVMessageType.error, &ServiceProviderEntityId.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &SamlEndpointLocation.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','WWP_GAM_SamlEndpointLocation'), DVMessageType.error, &SamlEndpointLocation.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &SingleLogoutendpoint.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','WWP_GAM_SingleLogoutEndpoint'), DVMessageType.error, &SingleLogoutendpoint.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If Not (not &DisableSingleLogout) &SingleLogoutendpoint.Visible = False SingleLogoutendpoint_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &SingleLogoutendpoint.Visible = True SingleLogoutendpoint_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 RequiredDataContentCell' EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event Refresh
&DeleteProperty.Enabled = false
EndEvent
Event Enter
Do 'CheckRequiredFields' If &CheckRequiredFieldsResult Do Case Case &Mode = TrnMode.Insert or &Mode = TrnMode.Update Do "SaveAuthenticationSaml" Case &Mode = TrnMode.Delete &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Load(&Name) &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Delete() EndCase If &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Success() and &Errors.Count = 0 Commit GAMWWAuthTypes() Else &Errors = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.GetErrors() For &Error in &Errors Msg(Format(!"%1 (GAM%2)", &Error.Message, &Error.Code)) EndFor EndIf EndIf
EndEvent
Event &DeleteProperty.Click
&DeleteProperty.FromImage(ActionDelete) &DeleteProperty.Visible = false &DynamicPropName.Visible = false &DynamicPropTag.Visible = false &DynamicPropName.SetEmpty() &DynamicPropTag.SetEmpty() &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Name = &Name &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.RemoveUserInfoProperty(&DynamicPropName,&Errors)
EndEvent
Event &DisableSingleLogout.Click
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Sub "InitAuthenticationSaml"
&AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Load(&Name) &Name = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Name &IsEnable = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.IsEnable &Dsc = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Description &SmallImageName = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.SmallImageName &BigImageName = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.BigImageName &Impersonate = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Impersonate &ServiceProviderEntityID = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.ServiceProviderEntityId &IdentityProviderEntityID = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.IdentityProviderEntityId &AuthnContext = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.AuthnContext &NameIDPolicyFormat = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.NameIDPolicyFormat &isRedirectBinding = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.isRedirectBinding &ForceAuthn = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.ForceAuthn &KeyAliasCredential = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.KeyAliasCredential &KeyAliasTrustCred = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.KeyAliasTrustCred &KeyStoreCredential = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.KeyStoreCredential &KeyStoreFilePathTrustCred = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.KeyStoreFilePathTrustCred &KeyStorePwdTrustCred = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.KeyStorePwdTrustCred &KeyStoreTrustCred = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.KeyStoreTrustCred &KeyStPathCredential = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.KeyStPathCredential &KeyStPwdCredential = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.KeyStPwdCredential &SamlEndpointLocation = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.SamlEndpointLocation &LocalSiteURL = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.LocalSiteURL &DisableSingleLogout = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.DisableSingleLogout &SingleLogoutendpoint = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.SingleLogoutendpoint &UserInfoResponseUserErrorDescriptionTag= &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseErrorDescription_Name &UserInfoResponseUserBirthdayTag = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserBirthday_Name &UserInfoResponseUserEmailTag = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserEmail_Name &UserInfoResponseUserExternalIdTag = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserExternalId_Name &UserInfoResponseUserFirstNameTag = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserFirstName_Name &UserInfoResponseUserGenderTag = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserGender_Name &UserInfoResponseUserGenderValues = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserGender_Values &UserInfoResponseUserLanguageTag = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserLanguage_Name &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameGenAuto= &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserLastName_GenerateAutomatic &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameTag = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserLastName_Name &UserInfoResponseUserNameTag = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserName_Name &UserInfoResponseUserTimeZoneTag = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserTimeZone_Name &UserInfoResponseUserURLImageTag = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserURLImage_Name &UserInfoResponseUserURLProfileTag = &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserURLProfile_Name
EndSub
Sub "SaveAuthenticationSaml"
&AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Load(&Name) &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Name = &Name &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.IsEnable = &IsEnable &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Description = &Dsc &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.SmallImageName = &SmallImageName &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.BigImageName = &BigImageName &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Impersonate = &Impersonate &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.ServiceProviderEntityId = &ServiceProviderEntityID &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.IdentityProviderEntityId = &IdentityProviderEntityID &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.AuthnContext = &AuthnContext &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.NameIDPolicyFormat = &NameIDPolicyFormat &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.isRedirectBinding = &isRedirectBinding &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.ForceAuthn = &ForceAuthn &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.KeyAliasCredential = &KeyAliasCredential &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.KeyAliasTrustCred = &KeyAliasTrustCred &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.KeyStoreCredential = &KeyStoreCredential &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.KeyStoreFilePathTrustCred = &KeyStoreFilePathTrustCred &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.KeyStorePwdTrustCred = &KeyStorePwdTrustCred &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.KeyStoreTrustCred = &KeyStoreTrustCred &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.KeyStPathCredential = &KeyStPathCredential &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.KeyStPwdCredential = &KeyStPwdCredential &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.SamlEndpointLocation = &SamlEndpointLocation &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.DisableSingleLogout = &DisableSingleLogout &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.SingleLogoutEndpoint = &SingleLogoutendpoint &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.LocalSiteURL = &LocalSiteURL &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseErrorDescription_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserErrorDescriptionTag &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserBirthday_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserBirthdayTag &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserEmail_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserEmailTag &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserExternalId_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserExternalIdTag &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserFirstName_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserFirstNameTag &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserGender_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserGenderTag &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserGender_Values = &UserInfoResponseUserGenderValues &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserLanguage_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserLanguageTag &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserLastName_GenerateAutomatic= &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameGenAuto &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserLastName_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameTag &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserName_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserNameTag &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserTimeZone_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserTimeZoneTag &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserURLImage_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserURLImageTag &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Saml20.UserInfo.ResponseUserURLProfile_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserURLProfileTag &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.Save()
For each line If not &DynamicPropName.IsEmpty() and not &DynamicPropTag.IsEmpty() &GAMPropertySimple = new() &GAMPropertySimple.Id = &DynamicPropName &GAMPropertySimple.Value = &DynamicPropTag If not &AuthenticationTypeSaml20.SetUserInfoProperty(&GAMPropertySimple, &Errors) For &Error in &Errors Msg(Format(!"%1 (GAM%2)", &Error.Message, &Error.Code),status) EndFor EndIf EndIf EndFor
EndSub
